product_overview: AI agent that turns messy photos, voice notes, and text into Google Calendar events.

general_info.name: Google OAuth Authentication
general_info.overview: Securely connect user's Google Calendar using OAuth 2.0.

scenarios.name: Successful Auth
scenarios.description: User clicks login, grants permissions, and token is saved.

general_info.name: Multimodal Input Processing
general_info.overview: Accept and parse photos, voice, and text inputs via Telegram.

scenarios.name: Photo Syllabus Parsing
scenarios.description: User sends a photo, AI extracts events and sends confirmation.

scenarios.name: Voice Note Parsing
scenarios.description: User sends voice, AI extracts time/title and creates event.

general_info.name: Freemium Limits
general_info.overview: Limit free users to 10 event syncs per month.

scenarios.name: Limit Exceeded
scenarios.description: User tries to sync 11th event and receives a payment prompt.
